assertions.scriptName: ordinary tables report reloftype=0 (PG-correct)
assertions.query:
SELECT relname, reloftype
FROM pg_catalog.pg_class
WHERE relname IN ('plain_t', 'with_unique')
ORDER BY relname;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF derives columns and records reloftype
assertions.query: SELECT id, name, active FROM typed_people;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF derives columns and records reloftype
assertions.query:
SELECT c.reloftype = t.oid
FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
JOIN pg_catalog.pg_type t ON t.typname = 'typed_person'
WHERE c.relname = 'typed_people';

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF derives columns and records reloftype
assertions.query:
SELECT table_name, is_typed, user_defined_type_catalog, user_defined_type_schema, user_defined_type_name
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_name IN ('plain_t', 'typed_people')
ORDER BY table_name;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF requires a composite type
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE typed_missing OF missing_type;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF requires a composite type
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE typed_mood OF mood_enum;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports schema-qualified type and table names
assertions.query: SELECT street, zip FROM app.addresses;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports schema-qualified type and table names
CREATE TEMP TABLE OF derives columns for session-local table
assertions.query: CREATE TEMP TABLE typed_scratch_rows OF typed_scratch;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF derives columns for session-local table
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_scratch_rows VALUES (1, 'temp row');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF derives columns for session-local table
assertions.query: SELECT id, note FROM typed_scratch_rows;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF derives columns for session-local table
assertions.query: CREATE TEMP TABLE IF NOT EXISTS typed_scratch_rows OF missing_type;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports primary key and column options
assertions.query: SELECT id, code, note FROM typed_tasks;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports primary key and column options
assertions.query:
SELECT column_name, is_nullable
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_name = 'typed_tasks' AND column_name IN ('id', 'code', 'note')
ORDER BY ordinal_position;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports primary key and column options
CREATE TABLE OF supports primary key and column options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_tasks (id, code) VALUES (2, NULL);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports unique options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_unique_tasks VALUES (3, 'A', 'third');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports unique options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_unique_tasks VALUES (4, 'C', 'second');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports unique options
assertions.query:
SELECT constraint_name, constraint_type
FROM information_schema.table_constraints
WHERE table_name = 'typed_unique_tasks' AND constraint_type = 'UNIQUE'
ORDER BY constraint_name;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports unique options
assertions.query:
SELECT indexname
FROM pg_catalog.pg_indexes
WHERE tablename = 'typed_unique_tasks'
ORDER BY indexname;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports unique options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_temp_unique_tasks VALUES (3, 'A', 'third');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports unique options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_temp_unique_tasks VALUES (4, 'C', 'second');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports unique options
assertions.query: UPDATE typed_temp_unique_tasks SET code = 'B' WHERE id = 1;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports unique options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_temp_unique_tasks VALUES (7, 'D', 'fourth'), (8, 'D', 'fifth');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF accepts unique index element options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_index_option_tasks VALUES (2, 'A');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF accepts unique index element options
CREATE TABLE OF supports unique nulls not distinct options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_unique_nnd_tasks VALUES (3, NULL, 'second');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports unique nulls not distinct options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_unique_nnd_tasks VALUES (4, 'B', NULL);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports unique nulls not distinct options
assertions.query:
SELECT c.relname, i.indnullsnotdistinct
	FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
	JOIN pg_catalog.pg_index i ON i.indexrelid = c.oid
	WHERE c.relname IN ('typed_unique_nnd_tasks_code_key', 'typed_unique_nnd_tasks_note_key')
	ORDER BY c.relname;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports unique nulls not distinct options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_temp_unique_nnd_tasks VALUES (3, NULL, 'second');

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports unique nulls not distinct options
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_temp_unique_nnd_tasks VALUES (4, 'B', NULL);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports literal column defaults
assertions.query: SELECT id, code, active, priority FROM typed_default_tasks ORDER BY id;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports literal column defaults
assertions.query:
SELECT column_name, (column_default IS NOT NULL)::text
	FROM information_schema.columns
	WHERE table_name = 'typed_default_tasks' AND column_name IN ('code', 'active', 'priority')
	ORDER BY ordinal_position;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports literal column defaults
assertions.query: SELECT id, code, priority FROM typed_temp_default_tasks;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports expression column defaults
assertions.query: SELECT id, code, priority FROM typed_expr_default_tasks;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports expression column defaults
assertions.query:
SELECT column_name, (column_default IS NOT NULL)::text
	FROM information_schema.columns
	WHERE table_name = 'typed_expr_default_tasks' AND column_name IN ('code', 'priority')
	ORDER BY ordinal_position;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports expression column defaults
assertions.query: SELECT id, code FROM typed_temp_expr_default_tasks;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports generated columns
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_generated_tasks (id, width, height, area) VALUES (2, 4, 5, 99);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports generated columns
assertions.query: SELECT id, area FROM typed_generated_tasks;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports generated columns
CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports generated columns
assertions.query: SELECT id, area FROM typed_temp_generated_tasks;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports check constraints
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_check_tasks VALUES (2, 'B', 0);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports check constraints
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_check_tasks VALUES (3, '', 5);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports check constraints
assertions.query: UPDATE typed_check_tasks SET priority = -1 WHERE id = 1;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports check constraints
assertions.query:
SELECT constraint_name, constraint_type
	FROM information_schema.table_constraints
	WHERE table_name = 'typed_check_tasks' AND constraint_type = 'CHECK'
	ORDER BY constraint_name;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports check constraints
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_temp_check_tasks VALUES (2, 0);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMP TABLE OF supports check constraints
assertions.query: UPDATE typed_temp_check_tasks SET priority = 0 WHERE id = 1;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports foreign key constraints
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_fk_tasks VALUES (2, 2, 1);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports foreign key constraints
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_fk_tasks VALUES (3, 1, 3);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF supports foreign key constraints
assertions.query:
SELECT constraint_name, constraint_type
	FROM information_schema.table_constraints
	WHERE table_name = 'typed_fk_tasks' AND constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY'
	ORDER BY constraint_name;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF rejects unsupported table-definition options
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE typed_unknown OF typed_options (missing WITH OPTIONS NOT NULL);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF rejects unsupported table-definition options
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE typed_unique_missing OF typed_options (UNIQUE (missing));

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF rejects unsupported table-definition options
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE typed_unique_duplicate OF typed_options (UNIQUE (code, code));

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF rejects unsupported table-definition options
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE typed_partitioned OF typed_options PARTITION BY LIST (id);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF rejects unsupported table-definition options
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE typed_exclude OF typed_options (EXCLUDE USING gist (id WITH =));

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF rejects unsupported table-definition options
assertions.query: CREATE TEMP TABLE typed_temp_fk OF typed_options (CONSTRAINT typed_temp_fk_parent FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES typed_options_parent(id));
